correlationsNoKey: Add an OpenRouter key in AI settings to get insights.
correlationsNotEnoughData: Need at least 7 logs in the last 30 days. Currently: {count}.
correlationsRateLimited: OpenRouter daily limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
correlationsEmpty: No strong correlations yet — keep logging habits.
onboardingS2P1: Every habit is a vote for the person you want to become. Small actions, repeated again and again, change your identity.
onboardingS2P2: HabitFlow is built on behavioral science: not on willpower, but on a system that works even when motivation fades.
onboardingS2Quote: “Every action is a vote for the person you wish to become.”
onboardingS3Sub: Don't try to change everything. Pick one habit for this month.
onboardingS5Text: At the scheduled time the bot will send a Telegram message. You can mark it done right there — no need to open the app.
emptyDescNoHabits:
Create your first one — to start
you only need one tiny habit
emptyDescNoEntries:
Write down how the day went —
it takes a couple of minutes
emptyDescNoSummaries: The first summary appears after 30 journal entries. You have {count} now.
emptyDescNoKey: AI runs on your key. The free model is available without payment.
emptyDescNoInternet:
Check your connection
and try again
emptyDescAiLimit: You've used all 200 requests for today.
emptyDescBadKey: Looks like the key is invalid or your balance is empty.
celebrationQuote1: Small steps, every day — that's the whole secret.
celebrationQuote2: You showed up. That's already a victory.
habitCreateStep1Subtitle: This affects how you'll mark it.
habitCreateStep2Subtitle: What will the habit be called?
habitCreateStep3RemindersHint: Multiple allowed — e.g., 3 times a day for water.
habitCreateStep4Subtitle: Optional. These fields use proven techniques to make the habit actually stick. You can skip.
habitCreateStep4StackingSubtitle: After which habit do you do the new one?
habitCreateStep4IntentionSubtitle: Where and when exactly do you do it?
habitCreateStep4IntentionWhereHint: Where: e.g., on the bedroom mat
habitCreateStep4IdentityNote: This phrase will appear in reminders.
habitCreateStep4TwoMinHint: E.g.: 1 minute of breathing instead of meditation
habitCreateStep4RewardSubtitle: What I get when I do it
habitCreateStep4RewardHint: E.g.: a good cup of coffee after
habitDetailDeleteConfirmBody: All logs and history will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
journalListStreak: Journaling for {days} days in a row 🔥
journalEditPlaceholder: What's important to write about today?
analyticsAiCorrelationsMessage: Add an OpenRouter key to see personal correlations and insights about your habits.
weeklyReviewSubtitle: A short Sunday checklist to close the week.
aiChatSuggestion5: How to improve my morning ritual?
aiChatDisclaimerText: Each message is an API call billed to your OpenRouter account. The free model is limited to 200 requests per day. Content is sent to OpenRouter and the model provider. Don't write anything you're not ready to share.
aiChatDeleteConfirmText: All messages will be removed. This cannot be undone.
aiChatRateLimitedText: You've hit OpenRouter's daily limit (200 requests for the free model). Try again tomorrow or pick a paid model in AI settings.
aiChatNoKeyText: Open AI settings and paste your key — the chat needs it to send messages.
aiChatErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.
aiStyleCoachPreview: Three skips in a row is a pattern. What exactly is getting in the way: time, motivation, or circumstances? Let's analyze and adjust the plan.
aiStyleSergeantDesc: Direct, no excuses. Tough but honest.
aiStyleSergeantPreview: Three times. No exceptions. This isn't circumstances — it's a choice. Either you do it today, or you admit it's not a priority.
aiStyleBuddyPreview: Hey, it's fine! Life happens 😅 Three skips is not a disaster. You're already here and thinking about it, which is a win. Tomorrow?
aiStyleSagePreview: “It's not the fall that defines us, but how we rise.” Three skips is just a ripple on the water. A habit is not a streak, but an intention. What does this silence tell you?
aiStylePoetPreview: Three empty evenings, like blank stanzas. The body remembers the rhythm, even when the mind forgets. What stopped the movement?
aiSummariesInfoBanner: A summary is generated automatically every {interval} journal entries. You currently have {count} — next one in {remaining}.
aiSummaryChatPrompt: Analyze this summary in more detail
aiSummaryRegenerateConfirmText: The current summary will be replaced with a new one.
aiPromptDeleteConfirmText: This custom prompt will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
aiPromptSystem1Desc: Analyze my habits and recent journal entries. Find hidden patterns: on which days or periods am I most productive, when does productivity drop, and how is it correlated with my mood?
aiPromptSystem2Desc: Identify details in my data that I might be overlooking. Which habits am I silently sabotaging? What emotional states usually precede skipped habits? Point out non-obvious correlations.
aiPromptSystem3Desc: Evaluate the stability of my habits over the last week. Identify which ones are at the highest risk of being dropped, explain why, and suggest a simple strategy to rescue them.
aiPromptSystem4Desc: Review my current lifestyle based on my logs and habits. Suggest one new micro-habit I should adopt next that fits organically into my schedule and amplifies my current progress.
aiPromptSystem5Desc: Perform a content analysis of my journal entries over the past week. What was my prevailing emotional state? What triggers caused joy, and what caused anxiety or energy drains?
aiPromptSystem6Desc: Correlate my habit completion rates with my mood and energy levels from the journal. How do physical habits (sleep, exercise, nutrition) directly impact my emotional well-being?
aiPromptSystem7Desc: Compare my current performance and reflection with past periods. Where is my most significant progress? How has my attitude towards difficulties evolved, and what positive shifts occurred?
aiPromptSystem8Desc: Analyze the habits I perform poorly or consistently postpone. Should I simplify them, temporarily remove them, or replace them with something more relevant right now?
aiPromptSystem9Desc: Examine my habits and daily schedule in the journal. How can I better group my tasks and habits (morning/afternoon/evening) based on my energy peaks to conserve willpower?
aiPromptSystem10Desc: Review my goals and reflections. Do my daily actions align with the person I aspire to be? Where is the biggest gap between my ideals and my actual daily actions, and how can I close it?
aiPromptSystem11Desc: Examine my current habit streaks. Are they genuinely helping me grow, or have they become a chore just to keep the counter going? How can I refocus on quality rather than numbers?
aiPromptSystem12Desc: Analyze all days when I failed or skipped habits. What external events, people, or internal states (fatigue, stress) served as triggers? Create a fallback plan to handle these triggers next time.
aiPromptSystem13Desc: Identify 2-3 habits that I perform most consistently. How can I use them as anchors to stack new, more challenging habits onto them, building a stable morning or evening ritual?
aiPromptSystem14Desc: Based on my reflection from the past week, write me a warm, supportive letter from the perspective of a compassionate and wise friend. Acknowledge my efforts, gently highlight my wins, and help me soften self-criticism.
aiPromptsIntro: Ready-made AI prompts. Tap one to start a chat with it.
profileDeleteAccountMessage: All habits, journal entries and AI history will be deleted permanently. This cannot be undone.
donateHeroMessage: HabitFlow will always be free. If the app helps you — support the project via Telegram Stars. It gives me time and energy to make it better.
donateMobileNote: Telegram Desktop is ~30% better than mobile (Apple/Google fees).
donateThanksMessage: You supported the project. It means a lot!
donateErrorMessage: Could not create the invoice. Please try again.
donateNotAvailableTitle: Payment is not available in standalone app
donateNotAvailableMessage: Please open Habit Flow directly inside Telegram (as a Mini App) to support the project.
notificationsTelegramDesc: Notifications come from @habitflow_bot. They are regular messages with buttons — no system push.
notificationsReflectionHint: The bot will ask what mattered today
notificationsQuietHint: No notifications during this window. Habits inside it are postponed.
notificationsPreviewHint: This is what a regular habit reminder looks like
notificationsPreviewBubble:
🌅 Morning meditation — your time. Minimum is 1 minute.
Streak: 14 days 🔥
aiSettingsStyleExampleHeader: EXAMPLE REPLY · “I MISSED THE GYM THREE TIMES”
aiSettingsUsageNote: Paid models are billed to your OpenRouter account.
aiSettingsHowItem1Text: The API key is stored only on your device and sent directly to OpenRouter. HabitFlow never sees the key or your messages.
aiSettingsHowItem2Text: It's a proxy that gives access to dozens of AI models via a single API. Free models don't require any balance.
aiSettingsHowItem3Title: Pay only for what you use
aiSettingsHowItem3Text: Paid models are billed from your OpenRouter balance. Free ones — with limits 20 RPM and 200 RPD — work right away.
reflectionTemplateDesc: These questions appear in your journal when you toggle “Show questions”. You can edit, add and remove them.
aboutWhatText: HabitFlow is a Telegram Mini App: habit tracker, reflection journal and AI analyst of personal data.
aboutPrinciplesText: Telegram-native · BYO OpenRouter key · fully free with Telegram Stars donations · behavioral science in UX · RU + EN from day one.
privacyAuthText: HabitFlow uses Telegram initData to log in — we don't ask for email or password. The signed Telegram payload goes to the server, we validate it and issue a JWT. No third-party providers.
privacyStorageText: Habits, completion marks, journal entries, AI chat history are stored in our Supabase Postgres. Data is tied to your telegram_user_id and only accessible to you via Row Level Security.
privacyKeyText: The OpenRouter API key is yours (BYO key). It's stored locally on your device and sent directly to OpenRouter. HabitFlow never sees the key or your AI messages.
privacyNotCollectText: We don't log initData, don't share data with third parties, don't show ads, don't use analytics on user actions in-app.
privacyDeletionText: In the “Danger zone” section you can delete your account. All habits, journal and AI history are cascade-deleted from the DB. Recovery is not possible.
privacyContactText: Privacy questions — write to the author via the “Contact author” section in profile.
contactDesc: Write if you found a bug, have a feature idea or just want to chat. Usually I reply within a couple of days.
splashOutsideTelegramDesc: HabitFlow is a Telegram Mini App. Open it through the bot or a t.me link inside Telegram.
splashAuthErrorDesc: Could not connect to the server. Check your connection and try again.
errorNetworkDesc: Check your connection and try again.
errorUnauthorizedDesc: Your session has expired. Please re-open the app.
errorAiLimitDesc: You've used all requests. Wait or switch to a different model.
errorServerDesc: Something went wrong on the server side. Please try again.
errorValidationDesc: Some fields are filled in incorrectly.
errorGenericDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
deviceLinkInstructions:
1. Tap the button below to open our Telegram bot.
2. Tap 'Start' or 'Launch' to confirm linking.
3. Keep this screen open; your device will pair automatically.
deviceLinkReasonExpired: The link has expired. Please try again.
deviceLinkReasonConsumed: This link was already used. Please try again.
deviceLinkReasonUnknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
